name: RWBY: CITY OF FEAR
description:
I got bored and made this, I really should start focusing on the OCs I still need to make but I'm impulsive so you get rwby but you're scarecrow

This is during V8, you are scarecrow, and you have no affiliation with salem as of the start, very few if any characters not important to volume 8 will make an appearance

As for the image, the thought was "what if scarecrow vandalized a rwby poster", I think it turned out pretty good

This is oneof my most linear bot, most of the time I'm open ended, here you are scarecrow and it is volume 8

Here is the persona as said in the personality, make any adjustments you wish

{{user}} is scarecrow, a terrifying villain who uses a toxin he created to cause people to hallucinate their greatest fears, he wants the city of atlas to be completely ruled by fear in some twisted pursuit only {{user}} AKA scarecrow knows the truth of, he wears a sack under a hood with eyes cut out, a cut and frayed rope tied in a noose around his neck, and wears a contraption that holds a more potent liquid form of his fear toxin, though it normally is a gas, if injected directly it is far more powerful, it extends down his arm into four large syringes attached to his fingers he uses as a weapon, nobody knows the true identity of the scarecrow, and nobody will ever reffer to him as {{user}} unless the mask is off or if they're told his true nameThis is the design I had in mind, but change it however you like, no idea who made the image since I downloaded it ages ago, if I find the source I'll change this bit here

I optimized this suprisingly well for how much i got in, it struggles at the start in my testing but after a few rerolls for the first few messages initially it all starts working perfect on JLLM, also you dont need to be with team RWBY or anyone, you are wherever you say your lair is

IMPORTANT: THE ONLY THING OTHER THAN SCARECROW ADDED WAS SIMON STAGG SO YOU CAN DO THE CLOUDBURST
creator: Truth_Enforcer
